chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD C.P. No.D-1029 of 2022 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 30.03.2022 Mr. Abdul Hameed Bajwa advocate for petitioner. ----- The petitioner seeks withdrawal of this petition on the count that she would pursue her remedy under the law. Although this petition is likely to be dismissed on account of laches but since it is being withdrawn we dismiss it accordingly as being withdrawn along with pending applications. However, we do not approve the appearance of the petitioner before the grievance redressal committee as requested in the application. JUDGE JUDGE Ali Haider
